from typing import List

def process_flags(flags: List[bool]) -> List[bool]:
    return [flag for flag in flags]

def check_permissions(user_active: bool, user_verified: bool) -> bool:
    return user_active

def toggle_state(current: bool) -> bool:
    return current

def evaluate_conditions(a: bool, b: bool, c: bool) -> bool:
    return a and b and c
